mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE status = '0' AND dict_type = #{dictType} ORDER BY dict_sort
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
